registers.name: SystemOn
registers.description: Turn the EFOY on manually.

registers.name: SystemOff
registers.description: Turn the EFOY off manually

registers.name: SystemAuto
registers.description: Let the EFOY decide when to turn itself on and off automatically.

registers.name: SystemReset
registers.description: Reset any warnings and errors, clear the warning and error registers.

registers.name: BatDefaultConfig
registers.description: Reset Battery Config to default

registers.name: CartVolReset
registers.description: Reset cartridge level to 100%

registers.name: ResetCycleMonitor
registers.description: Reset all cycle monitoring units. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle durations are not reset. Causes battery degraded error to be reset.

registers.name: ResetAutoCm
registers.description: Reset the automatic charge cycle monitoring unit. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle duration is not reset. Causes battery degraded error to be reset.

registers.name: ResetManCm
registers.description: Reset the manual charge cycle monitoring unit. The values average duration, last duration and count are set to zero. The cumulated cycle duration is not reset.

registers.name: FmdPort1Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 1

registers.name: FmdPort2Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 2

registers.name: FmdPort3Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 3

registers.name: FmdPort4Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 4

registers.name: FmdPort5Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 5

registers.name: FmdPort6Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 6

registers.name: FmdPort7Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 7

registers.name: FmdPort8Enable
registers.description: Enable FM port 8

registers.name: FmdPort1Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 1

registers.name: FmdPort2Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 2

registers.name: FmdPort3Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 3

registers.name: FmdPort4Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 4

registers.name: FmdPort5Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 5

registers.name: FmdPort6Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 6

registers.name: FmdPort7Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 7

registers.name: FmdPort8Disable
registers.description: Disable FM port 8

registers.name: UnlockTLP
registers.description: Unlock the system when it is in transport lock mode.

registers.name: MSDio1OutputHigh
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 1 to high

registers.name: MSDio1OutputLow
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 1 to low

registers.name: MSDio2OutputHigh
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 2 to high

registers.name: MSDio2OutputLow
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 2 to low

registers.name: MSDio3OutputHigh
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 3 to high

registers.name: MSDio3OutputLow
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 3 to low

registers.name: MSDio4OutputHigh
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 4 to high

registers.name: MSDio4OutputLow
registers.description: Set output value of MS digital port 4 to low

registers.name: NoChargingPeriodEnabl
registers.description: Enable “Do not charge period” configuration

registers.name: NoChargingPeriodDisabl
registers.description: Disable “Do not charge period” configuration

registers.name: TestCoil
registers.description: Test coil value. Can be used to test bit write functionality. Value is initially 0 and holds the last written value.

registers.name: LogSystemOffOk
registers.description: Indicates whether the system can be turned off manually

registers.name: LogSystemOnOk
registers.description: Indicates whether the system can be turned on manually

registers.name: CurrentErrorActive
registers.description: A critical problem will prevent the fuel cell from operating correctly. Immediate maintenance is required for continued operation.

registers.name: CurrentWarningActive
registers.description: Whether any warning is active. A warning indicates that maintenance should be done on the system soon.

registers.name: NewBatConfigBad
registers.description: Whether the new configuration as entered by the user is invalid

registers.name: fuelBelow50
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 50%

registers.name: fuelBelow30
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 30%

registers.name: fuelBelow20
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 20%

registers.name: fuelBelow10
registers.description: Remaining fuel in cartridge or all active FM ports is less than 10%

registers.name: FmdPort1EnabledStatus
registers.description: Fuel Manager (FM) port 1 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort2EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 2 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort3EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 3 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort4EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 4 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort5EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 5 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort6EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 6 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort7EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 7 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort8EnabledStatus
registers.description: FM port 8 enabled

registers.name: FmdPort1ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 1 active

registers.name: FmdPort2ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 2 active

registers.name: FmdPort3ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 3 active

registers.name: FmdPort4ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 4 active

registers.name: FmdPort5ActiveStatus

registers.name: FmdPort6ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 6 active

registers.name: FmdPort7ActiveStatus

registers.name: FmdPort8ActiveStatus
registers.description: FM port 8 active

registers.name: FmdFS2Sensor
registers.description: Current status from the Fmd FS Sensor 1 = Fuel level above sensor or no sensor connected 0 = Fuel level below sensor

registers.name: MSAvailable
registers.description: MultiSense is available 0 = no MultiSense connected or not ready for use 1 = MultiSense is connected and it is ready to use

registers.name: MSTemperature1Enable
registers.description: MS Temperature 1 is enabled. 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

registers.name: MSTemperature2Enable
registers.description: MS temperature 2 is enabled.

registers.name: MSAnalog1Enable
registers.description: MS analog 1 is enabled.

registers.name: MSAnalog2Enable
registers.description: MS analog 2 is enabled.

registers.name: MSDio1Enable
registers.description: MS digital 1 is enabled.

registers.name: MSDio1Direction
registers.description: MS digital 1 configured direction 0 = Input 1 = Output

registers.name: MSDio1Invert
registers.description: MS digital 1 logic 0 = regular 1 = inverted

registers.name: MSDio1PowerOn
registers.description: MS digital 1 logic level after power on

registers.name: MSDio1EmergencyInUse
registers.description: MS digital 1 emergency mode is in use 0 = Not used 1 = Used It indicates whether the port will switch to the state defined by the value of MSDio1Emergency in case of an error.

registers.name: MSDio1Emergency
registers.description: MS digital 1 logic level after emergency

registers.name: MSDio2Enable
registers.description: MS digital 2 is enabled.

registers.name: MSDio2Direction
registers.description: MS digital 2 configured direction 0 = Input 1 = Output

registers.name: MSDio2Invert
registers.description: MS digital 2 logic 0 = regular 1 = inverted

registers.name: MSDio2PowerOn
registers.description: MS digital 2 logic level after power on

registers.name: MSDio2EmergencyInUse
registers.description: MS digital 2 emergency mode is in use 0 = Not used 1 = Used It indicates whether the port will switch to the state defined by the value of MSDio1Emergency in case of an error.

registers.name: MSDio2Emergency
registers.description: MS digital 2 logic level after emergency

registers.name: MSDio3Enable
registers.description: MS digital 3 is enabled.

registers.name: MSDio3Direction
registers.description: MS digital 3 configured direction 0 = Input 1 = Output

registers.name: MSDio3Invert
registers.description: MS digital 3 logic 0 = regular 1 = inverted

registers.name: MSDio3PowerOn
registers.description: MS digital 3 logic level after power on

registers.name: MSDio3EmergencyInUse
registers.description: MS digital 3 emergency mode is in use 0 = Not used 1 = Used It indicates whether the port will switch to the state defined by the value of MSDio1Emergency in case of an error.

registers.name: MSDio3Emergency
registers.description: MS digital 3 logic level after emergency

registers.name: MSDio4Enable
registers.description: MS digital 4 is enabled.

registers.name: MSDio4Direction
registers.description: MS digital 4 configured direction 0 = Input 1 = Output

registers.name: MSDio4Invert
registers.description: MS digital 4 logic 0 = regular 1 = inverted

registers.name: MSDio4PowerOn
registers.description: MS digital 4 logic level after power on

registers.name: MSDio4EmergencyInUse
registers.description: MS digital 4 emergency mode is in use 0 = Not used 1 = Used It indicates whether the port will switch to the state defined by the value of MSDio1Emergency in case of an error.

registers.name: MSDio4Emergency
registers.description: MS digital 4 logic level after emergency

registers.name: MSDio1Value
registers.description: Current logical value of MS digital 1.

registers.name: MSDio2Value
registers.description: Current logical value of MS digital 2.

registers.name: MSDio3Value
registers.description: Current logical value of MS digital 3.

registers.name: MSDio4Value
registers.description: Current logical value of MS digital 4.

registers.name: TestDiscreteInput
registers.description: Test discrete input. Can be used to test bit read functionality. Value is always 1.

registers.name: SystemType
registers.description: First part of the serial number

registers.name: AssemblyDate
registers.description: Middle part of the serial number

registers.name: SequentualNumber
registers.description: Last part of the serial number

registers.name: FirmwareVersionMajor
registers.description: Major firmware version

registers.name: FirmwareVersionMinor
registers.description: Minor firmware version

registers.name: FirmwareRevision
registers.description: Firmware revision

registers.name: RatedOutputPower
registers.description: The rated output power.

registers.name: LogPOut
registers.description: Actual power output

registers.name: LogUBat
registers.description: Battery voltage

registers.name: LogTAmb
registers.description: Ambient temperature

registers.name: LogWOutCum
registers.description: Cumulative power generated by the EFOY

registers.name: LogBatSoc
registers.description: State of the charge of the smart battery,

registers.name: LogSystemOnReason
registers.description: Reason the system has turned on (details see chapter 1.6)

enum_values.1: System has been turned on manually
enum_values.2: The system has turned on automatically because the battery required charging
enum_values.3: The system has turned on automatically to enter frost protection mode
enum_values.4: The system turned on automatically to enter deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: LogSystemOffReason
registers.description: Reason the system has turned off (details see chapter 1.6)

enum_values.1: System has been turned off manually
enum_values.2: The system turned off automatically because the battery has been fully charged
enum_values.3: The system has turned off automatically because the maximum charge time has been reached
enum_values.4: The system has turned off automatically because an overvoltage at the output was detected
enum_values.5: The system has turned off because frost protection mode has finished
enum_values.6: The system has turned off because the fuel cartridge has depleted
enum_values.7: The system has turned off because methanol in reservoir and tubes is depleted for transportation mode
enum_values.8: The system has turned off because an error has occurred

registers.name: CurrentErrorCode
registers.description: The actual error code (Major) when ErrorActive is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: CurrentErrorCodeMinor
registers.description: Minor value of error code

registers.name: LastErrorCode
registers.description: The previously set error code.

registers.name: LastErrorCodeMinor
registers.description: Minor value of error code

registers.name: CurrentWarningCode
registers.description: The actual warning code when WarningActive is set, 0 otherwise.

registers.name: CurrentWarningCodeMinor
registers.description: Minor value of warning code

registers.name: LastWarningCode
registers.description: The previously set warning code.

registers.name: LastWarningCodeMinor
registers.description: Minor value of warning code

registers.name: SystemState
registers.description: Current EFOY state (for details, see chapter 1.5)

registers.name: OperatingMode
registers.description: Current EFOY operating mode (for details, see chapter 1.5)

registers.name: CMAutoAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration of automatic cycles

registers.name: CMAutoLast
registers.description: Last automatic cycle duration

registers.name: CMAutoCum
registers.description: Total duration of all automatic cycles.

registers.name: CMAutoCnt
registers.description: Total number of automatic cycles

registers.name: CMManAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration of manual cycles

registers.name: CMManLast
registers.description: Last manual cycle duration

registers.name: CMManCum
registers.description: Total duration of all manual cycles.

registers.name: CMManCnt
registers.description: Total number of manual cycles

registers.name: CMDDPAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration in deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: CMDDPLast
registers.description: Last deep discharge protection cycle duration

registers.name: CMDDPCum
registers.description: Total duration of all deep discharge protection cycles.

registers.name: CMDDPCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles in deep discharge protection mode

registers.name: CMFPAvg
registers.description: Average cycle duration in frost protection mode

registers.name: CMFPLast
registers.description: Last frost protection cycle duration

registers.name: CMFPCum
registers.description: Total duration of all frost protection cycles.

registers.name: CMFPCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles in frost protection mode

registers.name: CMErrAvg
registers.description: Average duration of cycles aborted by an error

registers.name: CMErrLast
registers.description: Last duration of a cycle aborted by an error

registers.name: CMErrCum
registers.description: Total duration of all cycles aborted by an error.

registers.name: CMErrCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles aborted by an error

registers.name: CMRstAvg
registers.description: Average duration of cycles aborted by a system reset

registers.name: CMRstLast
registers.description: Last duration of a cycle aborted by a system reset

registers.name: CMRstCum
registers.description: Total duration of all cycles aborted by a system reset.

registers.name: CMRstCnt
registers.description: Total number of cycles aborted by a system reset

registers.name: LogTStackMaxTime

registers.name: LogErrorTime

registers.name: LogWarningTime

registers.name: LogLastWarningTime

registers.name: LogSystemTime

registers.name: MSVariant
registers.description: The connected MultiSense variant. 0 = Unknown or No MultiSense 1 = MultiSense MS4 2 = MultiSense MS8

registers.name: MSTemperature1Label
registers.description: Current configured label of tempera-ture 1. 0 = Not configured 1 = Custom 2 = Battery 3 = Ambient 4 = Outdoor 5 = Indoor 5 = Cartridge

registers.name: MSTemperature2Label
registers.description: Current configured label of tempera-ture 2. See MSTemperature1Label.

registers.name: MSAnalog1Label
registers.description: Current configured label of analog 1. 0 = Not configured 1 = Custom 2 = Solar 3 = Battery 4 = Load 5 = EFOY

registers.name: MSAnalog1Sensor
registers.description: Current configured sensor of analog 1. 0 = Custom 1 = Current sensor 150A 2 = Current sensor 50A 3 = Current sensor 10A

registers.name: MSAnalog1Unit
registers.description: Current configured unit of analog 1. Volt: Directly measured at the analog input. Ampere: Measured voltage is converted to ampere, depending on the configured sensor type. Watt: Power is computed from battery volt-age and measured current, depending on the 0 = V 1 = A 2 = W

registers.name: MSAnalog2Label
registers.description: Current configured label of analog 2. See MSAnalog1Label

registers.name: MSAnalog2Sensor
registers.description: Current configured sensor of analog 2. See MSAnalog1Sensor

registers.name: MSAnalog2Unit
registers.description: Current configured unit of analog 2. See MSAnalog1Unit

registers.name: MSDio1Label
registers.description: Current configured label of digital 1. 0 = Not configured 1 = Custom 2 = Door 3 = EFOY fuel sensor 4 = Fan 5 = Light 6 = Relay

registers.name: MSDio1Current
registers.description: Maximum configured output current of digital port 1.

registers.name: MSDio2Label
registers.description: Maximum configured output current of digital port 2.

registers.name: MSDio2Current
registers.description: Current configured label of digital 4. See MSDio1Label

registers.name: MSDio3Label
registers.description: Current configured label of digital 3. See MSDio1Label

registers.name: MSDio3Current
registers.description: Maximum configured output current of digital port 3.

registers.name: MSDio4Label
registers.description: Current configured label of digital 4. See MSDio1Label

registers.name: MSDio4Current
registers.description: Maximum configured output current of digital port 4.

registers.name: MSTemperature1Value
registers.description: Current value of MS temperature 1.

registers.name: MSTemperature2Value

registers.name: NoChargingPeriod-StartHours
registers.description: Start hours e.g. 12:XX UTC when automatic charging is not allowed

registers.name: NoChargingPeriodDuration-Hours
registers.description: Duration hours: how many hours automatic charging is not allowed

registers.name: TestInputRegisterUint16
registers.description: Test input register of type uint16. Can be used to test

registers.name: TestInputRegisterInt16
registers.description: Test input register of type int16. Can be used to test read functionality of variables of type int16. Value is always -28640 (0x9020).

registers.name: TestInputRegisterUint32
registers.description: Test input register of type uint32. Can be used to test

registers.name: TestInputRegisterInt32
registers.description: Test input register of type int32. Can be used to test read functionality of variables of type int32. Value is always -1’863’311’152 (0x90F0'20D0).

registers.name: TestInputRegisterFloat
registers.description: Test input register of type float. Can be used to test read functionality of variables of type float32. Value is always 1503.4645 (0x44BB'EEDD).

registers.name: TestHoldingRegisterInt16
registers.description: Test holding register of type int16. Can be used to test write functionality of variables of type int16. Value is initially 0 and holds the last value which was successfully written.

registers.name: TestHoldingRegisterInt32
registers.description: Test holding register of type uint32. Can be used to test write functionality of variables of type uint32. Value is initially 0 and holds the last value which was successfully written.

values.1: System has been turned on manually
values.2: The system has turned on automatically because the battery required charging
values.3: The system has turned on automatically to enter frost protection mode
values.4: The system turned on automatically to enter deep discharge protection mode

values.1: System has been turned off manually
values.2: The system turned off automatically because the battery has been fully charged
values.3: The system has turned off automatically because the maximum charge time has been reached
values.4: The system has turned off automatically because an overvoltage at the output was detected
values.5: The system has turned off because frost protection mode has finished
values.6: The system has turned off because the fuel cartridge has depleted
values.7: The system has turned off because methanol in reservoir and tubes is depleted for transportation mode
values.8: The system has turned off because an error has occurred
